findings.description: Source contains a verification procedure section (еӢ•дҪңзўәиӘҚжүӢй Ҷ) with an example request URL (`http://localhost:9080/projects?clientId=1`) and an expected JSON response structure (e.g., `[{"projectId":1,"projectName":"гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲпјҗпјҗпј‘","projectType":"development",...}]`). The expected response JSON illustrates the shape of the returned array. This section is entirely absent from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: еӢ•дҪңзўәиӘҚжүӢй Ҷ section: URL `http://localhost:9080/projects?clientId=1`, HTTP method GET, and JSON response block with projectId/projectName/projectType fields.

findings.description: `MediaType` (used as `MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON` in @Produces annotation) is referenced in the source but not listed in the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: `@Produces(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)` appears in both the business action method and URL mapping code blocks in the source.
